description: Main project root for the operating system, providing file navigation and operations

children.name: __operations__
children.description: Core operations module; contains submodules for base utilities, file handlers, directories, paths, and tasks

children.name: __file__
children.description: File operations for plain text, JSON, and Pickle formats, plus base utilities and abstract structure

children.name: __base__
children.description: Base utilities: formats, keywords, logging, serializers, and helper classes

children.name: __formats__.py
children.description: Classes `Formats` (format detection, naming), `DictAttr` (dict with attribute access), and `VarsApi` (API method filtering)

children.name: __keywords__.py
children.description: Classes `OsKeywords` (system constants, extensions, reserved words), `AppKeywords` (app settings), and `SnakePascalName` (naming convention conversions)

children.name: __log__.py
children.description: Class `LifeCycleLog` for lifecycle event logging (start, working, stop) with log storage capability

children.name: __serializers__.py
children.description: Classes `DictAttr` (attribute‑accessible dict), `SerializersClear` (remove 'path' key), and `Vars` (extract class variables)

children.name: __init__.py
children.description: Exports from `__base__`: `DictAttr`, `LifeCycleLog`, `Formats`, `OsKeywords`, `SnakePascalName`, `SerializersClear`, `Vars`

children.name: __structure__
children.description: Abstract base class for HTTP‑like resource operations

children.name: __abstract__.py
children.description: Abstract class `HttpOperatorRequest` defining `create`, `read`, `update`, `clear`, `delete`; inherits from `LifeCycleLog`

children.name: __init__.py
children.description: Exports `HttpOperatorRequest` from this module

children.name: __file__.py
children.description: Class `File` for operations on plain text files (txt, csv, etc.) with logging

children.name: __json__.py
children.description: Class `JsonFile` for JSON file operations (read, write, clear)

children.name: __pickle__.py
children.description: Class `PickleFile` for Python pickle (binary serialization) operations

children.name: __init__.py
children.description: Exports from `__file__`: `File`, `JsonFile`, `PickleFile`, plus base utilities (`DictAttr`, `Formats`, etc.) and `HttpOperatorRequest`

children.name: __dir__
children.description: Directory operations

children.name: __dir__.py
children.description: Class `Dir` with methods `create`, `read`, `update` (rename), `clear` (empty contents), and `delete` (remove) with logging support

children.name: __init__.py
children.description: Exports `Dir` class

children.name: __path__
children.description: Path utilities and navigation

children.name: __path__.py
children.description: Class `Path` with methods `split`, `join`, `main_dir`, `path_builder`, etc. Also class `AppCurser` for fluent chained navigation via attribute/call access

children.name: __init__.py
children.description: Exports `Path` and `AppCurser`

children.name: __tasks__.py
children.description: Class `ToDo` with `on_genesis` and `to_do` methods; used as a base for `OperationsSystem`

children.name: _system_.py
children.description: Main classes: `CurserInformation` (path info storage), `Curser` (navigation and file/dir operations with chaining), `ShortCuts` (predefined paths), and `OperationsSystem` (high-level accessor with `desktop`, `assets`, `settings`, etc.)

children.name: __init__.py
children.description: Exports from the whole `__operations__` module: `HttpOperatorRequest`, `File`, `JsonFile`, `PickleFile`, `Dir`, `Path`, `AppCurser`, `DictAttr`, `LifeCycleLog`, `Formats`, `OsKeywords`, `SnakePascalName`, `SerializersClear`, `Vars`
